title: The Navy Closes In
description: On pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part focuses on the crew leaves alabasta behind. The Straw Hats move toward departure while Marines, allies, and the kingdom deal with the consequences of the battle.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Crew Leaves Alabasta Behind sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I had already resigned myself to death,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yes, it should be neutralized by now...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: More importantly, you should get back, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Get back out to the square.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: But it's gonna feel pretty anticlimactic,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Then all of you should also-

summary: The Straw Hats move toward departure while Marines, allies, and the kingdom deal with the consequences of the battle.
